productDisplayName: Puma Men's Vibrant Navy White Silver Shoe
description: The Vibrant V range of shoes from puma are meant for a variety of indoor Sports and training. Made of good quality materials and a non marking sole, these shoes look stylish and perform well. Upper Synthetic upper for durable protection Formstripe and cat logo on the sides for added comfort and style Appliqued cat logo on the tongue to create a fashion statement Cushioned collar and tongue for plush comfort Mesh tongue for breathability Midsole EcoOrthoLite midsole for maximum comfort and support Removable sole insert to accommodate an orthotic OthoLite sockliner for more comfort, material regeneration, air circulation and anti-microbial function   Outsole ArchTec technology to guide the foot through a natural transition from touch-down to toe-off IdCELL to improve shock absorption and protect the feet EverTrack used in the outsole for enhanced durability in high-wear areas Non-marking sole in multi-directional pattern for superior grip
